title: orchiodes bifidum
intro: Orchiodes bifidum, also known as Himalayan orchid, is a plant species belonging to the family Liliaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Orchiodes bifidum include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
